## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Diligent Boards product features, AI capabilities, and SMB market strategy with GrowthX for content marketing purposes.](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Diligent Boards offers unique AI-powered features throughout the meeting lifecycle, including Smart Board Book Builder and Smart Risk Scanner](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Focus on SMB market targets companies preparing for transactions (IPO, M\&A, Series A-D) with a suite of governance tools](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [Product differentiators include multi-language support, integration with NetSuite, and virtual data room capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)

## Topics

### AI Capabilities in Diligent Boards

  - [Smart Board Book Builder: Synthesizes raw information into first draft, saving time](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Smart Risk Scanner: Reviews documents for risky language before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [AI Smart Book Summary: Summarizes long board books for quick review](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [SmartPrep: Generates questions and discussion topics for meeting preparation](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [AI Smart Minutes: Converts meeting transcripts into minutes or drafts based on board book](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [AI Smart News and Competitive Insights: Delivers industry news to dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)

### SMB Market Strategy

  - [Narrative focuses on preparing companies for transactions (IPO, M\&A, Series A-D)](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [Suite includes board management software, virtual data room (Diligent Data Room), and board reporting (NetSuite integration)](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
  - [Target audience: Companies with $10M-$500M revenue, emphasis on tech startups](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
  - [Key trigger: Adding external institutional investors, formalizing board structure](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)

### Global Product Considerations

  - [Multi-language support for meetings and documents](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [Potential security adaptations for different regions (specifics to be provided later)](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
  - [No significant product differences noted between US and international markets](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)

### Corporate Secretary/General Counsel Persona

  - [SMBs: Board meeting prep often involves CFO and executive leadership due to flatter structures](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [Enterprises: More robust legal departments, dedicated corporate secretaries handle board meeting preparation](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Eleni to compile and send a "care package" of PMM and B documentation on SMB positioning, messaging, target audience, and value propositions](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
  - [Eleni to provide more specific information on compliance-related triggers for SMBs](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [Eleni to share details on any product differences or security adaptations for international markets](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
  - [GrowthX to use provided information for AI-driven content creation, focusing on SMB market segment](https://fathom.video/share/v2txZsxW1T48xZWGXNJvVKRzdRjLGE4y?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
